description: The `ShowSecondsInClock` DSC resource is used to show or hide seconds in the taskbar clock.
author: Microsoft Corporation

embedded.description: The `ShowSecondsInClock` DSC resource is used to show or hide seconds in the taskbar clock.

SID.title: SID
SID.description: The security identifier. This is a key property and should not be set manually.

Ensure.title: Ensure
Ensure.description:
Specifies whether seconds should be shown (`Present`) or hidden (`Absent`) in the clock.
        Defaults to `Present`.

embedded.title: Microsoft.Windows.Developer/ShowSecondsInClock
